We deploy advanced diagnostic equipment and precision craftsmanship to resolve the most complex plumbing challenges.

What Our Customers Say

Rated 4.3/5 from 100+ verified Google Reviews

DS

Diana S.

Scarborough, ON
verified
star star star star star

"Had to get 2 faucet cartridges and faucets replaced and flusher handle on toilet. Anson our serviceman was awesome — very efficient and explained everything in detail."

Posted on Google — 11 months ago

GTA
verified
star star star star star

"Quick and excellent service, had exactly what I needed. Thanks Bradshaw!"

Posted on Google — 1 year ago

GTA
verified
star star star star star

"Spoke to a gentleman over the phone regarding plumbing work. They sound like reliable, honest and good people. I would recommend them."

Posted on Google — 11 months ago

RA

Ray A.

Scarborough, ON
verified
star star star star star

"Great place and very helpful. They were able to provide the right piece that I needed. And even gave me helpful tips to ensure it didn't leak. I will come back here again."

Posted on Google — 3 months ago

ET

Elsa T.

Toronto, ON
verified
star star star star star

"My taps had been leaking for a long time and were totally corroded. I wondered how they would ever get them removed. The plumber Todd arrived — courteous, efficient, and got the job done with no mess left behind!"

Posted on Google — 2 months ago

NM

Nick M.

Scarborough, ON
verified
star star star star star

"I have gone to their store front on several occasions to get products and advice on do-it-myself repairs. The staff has always been really helpful and more than willing to give me pointers. Thanks!"

Posted on Google — 1 month ago
